title: Tax-Free Savings Account (TFSA) Statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## Tax-Free Savings Account statistics
The Tax-Free Savings Account (TFSA) statistics tables present data based on all of the individual records and summary returns sent by financial institutions (issuers) to the CRA for a specific tax year.
The reports contain three tables. The data in the tables are taken from the tax year which is typically published two years after the tax year ends.
- 2026 (2024 tax year)
- 2025 (2023 tax year)
- 2024 (2022 tax year)
- 2023 (2021 tax year)
- 2022 (2020 tax year)
- 2021 (2019 tax year)
- 2020 (2018 tax year)
- 2019 (2017 tax year)
- 2018 (2016 tax year)
- 2017 (2015 tax year)
- 2016 (2014 tax year)
- 2015 (2013 tax year)
- 2014 (2012 tax year)
- 2013 (2011 tax year)
- 2012 (2010 tax year)
- 2011 (2009 tax year)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
